about.title: Middle East Law Firm
about.p1: Founded in 2009 in the heart of Baghdad, Middle East Law Firm has become one of Iraq's leading legal firms.
about.p2: We combine deep expertise in Iraqi law with modern technology, including our AI legal assistant that provides instant answers to any legal question.
about.f4: Smart app for Android and iOS

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the cost of the first consultation?
faq.a1: The first consultation is completely free. We make sure to fully understand your case before determining any costs.
faq.q2: Is the AI legal assistant free?
faq.a2: Yes! The AI legal assistant is free for all website and app visitors.
faq.q3: Can I use the voice assistant?
faq.a3: Absolutely! The legal assistant supports voice input in Arabic, English, Kurdish, and other languages.
faq.q4: How do I download the app?
faq.a4: You can install the app directly from this website or download it from Google Play or App Store.
faq.q5: Is the legal information on the site up to date?
faq.a5: Yes, we continuously update the database to ensure accuracy and compliance with the latest legal amendments.
